key_themes: Successful 2025 commissioning and guidance delivery with first revenues/gross profit
Ambitious 4x+ production increase guided for 2026 (25-35koz) with Phase 2 flotation and owner-operator transition
High-grade drilling success, analyst buy ratings, offset by net losses, cash burn, and funding/dilution risks
sources_checked: Amaroq FY2025 results & 2026 guidance (GlobeNewswire/Yahoo Finance, Mar/Feb 2026)
MarketBeat, Seeking Alpha, Substack investor analysis
summary: Amaroq met its 2025 gold production guidance (~6.4koz) at Nalunaq, generating $27M revenue, $11.1M gross profit, and narrowing its net loss to ~$18.6M while completing Phase 1 commissioning.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/commodities/articles/2025-full-financial-results-070000393.html)[[2]](https://www.juniorminingnetwork.com/junior-miner-news/press-releases/2148-tsx-venture/amrq/200032-2025-full-year-financial-results.html) It guided for a substantial ramp to 25-35koz in 2026 (H1 7-10koz, back-end weighted with Phase 2 recoveries reaching 90-95%), lower unit costs from shifting to owner-operator, Q4 AISC $1,250-1,450/oz, plus positive high-grade drilling (e.g. 1,840 g/t) and broad exploration across Nanoq and other targets.[[3]](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/02/25/3244261/0/en/2026-Production-and-Financial-Guidance-and-Exploration-Update.html)[[3]](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/02/25/3244261/0/en/2026-Production-and-Financial-Guidance-and-Exploration-Update.html) Sentiment is net positive with reiterated buy ratings and operational progress, but the biggest risk is execution on the aggressive ramp-up targets combined with cash consumption (~$21.5M YE balance), debt milestones, and potential equity dilution.[[4]](https://www.webull.com.my/news-detail/14220596503348224)

recent_posts.highlight: AMRQ +5% on FY results; gross profit of $11.1M achieved, talks to expand debt facility and lower rate
Panmure Liberum note on results in line and securing more funding
Great update on Amaroq progress shared from positive investor Substack analysis
Flawless execution, production ahead of plan, high-grade results exceeding model, 2026 re-rate potential
